source_meta.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System

systems.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
systems.system_notes: Primary total hip construct anchored to official Stryker Insignia stem and Trident II acetabular materials.

trays.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials support shared general hip instrumentation across Insignia and Trident II total hip workflows.

components.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
components.component_notes: Official Insignia materials describe the collared metaphyseal-filling femoral stem family.

components.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
components.component_notes: Official Trident II materials describe the acetabular shell family used in the construct.

components.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
components.component_notes: Official Trident II materials describe compatible polyethylene and modular bearing options.

components.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
components.component_notes: Official Insignia surgical protocol states the stem is designed for use with Stryker V40 femoral heads and compatible acetabular components.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current Insignia and Trident II source set confirms the construct and component families but this pass does not include a clean single implant code matrix row.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU or implant catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
